creator: mav@FreeBSD.org
text: I believe software RAIDs are generally not widely used nowadays with ZFS used more and more often.  And JMicron is obviously not the leader of the market, comparing to Intel and AMD, or even Marvell SATA RAIDs (the last work on level of firmware, but take bigger part of the SATA market).  So if somebody make a nice workaround for the specific case -- I'd take a look, otherwise I am not sure what can we do about it, I have bigger fish to fry to look deep on this.
